info.title: dotnet-CycloneDX
info.description:
A .NET Core global tool which creates CycloneDX Software Bill-of-Materials (SBOM) from .NET projects.
Nutzung:
CycloneDX [<path>] [options]

options.name: --framework
options.description: The target framework to use. If not defined, all will be aggregated.

options.name: --runtime
options.description: The runtime to use. If not defined, all will be aggregated.

options.name: --output
options.description: The directory to write the BOM

options.name: --filename
options.description: Optionally provide a filename for the BOM (default: bom.xml or bom.json)

options.name: --exclude-dev
options.description: Exclude development dependencies from the BOM (see https://github.com/NuGet/Home/wiki/DevelopmentDependency-support-for-PackageReference)

options.name: --exclude-test-projects
options.description: Exclude test projects from the BOM

options.name: --url
options.description: Alternative NuGet repository URL to https://<yoururl>/nuget/<yourrepository>/v3/index.json

options.name: --baseUrlUsername
options.description: Alternative NuGet repository username. Falls back to the CYCLONEDX_NUGET_USERNAME environment variable.

options.name: --baseUrlUserPassword
options.description: Alternative NuGet repository username password/apikey. Falls back to the CYCLONEDX_NUGET_PASSWORD environment variable.

options.name: --isBaseUrlPasswordClearText
options.description: Alternative NuGet repository password is cleartext

options.name: --recursive
options.description: To be used with a single project file, it will recursively scan project references of the supplied project file

options.name: --no-serial-number
options.description: Optionally omit the serial number from the resulting BOM

options.name: --github-username
options.description: Optionally provide a GitHub username for license resolution. If set you also need to provide a GitHub personal access token. Falls back to the CYCLONEDX_GITHUB_USERNAME environment variable.

options.name: --github-token
options.description: Optionally provide a GitHub personal access token for license resolution. If set you also need to provide a GitHub username. Falls back to the CYCLONEDX_GITHUB_TOKEN environment variable.

options.name: --github-bearer-token
options.description: Optionally provide a GitHub bearer token for license resolution. This is useful in GitHub actions. Falls back to the CYCLONEDX_GITHUB_BEARER_TOKEN or GITHUB_TOKEN environment variables.

options.name: --enable-github-licenses
options.description: Enables GitHub license resolution

options.name: --disable-package-restore
options.description: Optionally disable package restore

options.name: --disable-hash-computation
options.description: Optionally disable hash computation for packages

options.name: --dotnet-command-timeout
options.description: dotnet command timeout in milliseconds (primarily used for long dotnet restore operations) [default: 300000]

options.name: --base-intermediate-output-path
options.description: Optionally provide a folder for customized build environment. Required if folder 'obj' is relocated.

options.name: --import-metadata-path
options.description: Optionally provide a metadata template which has project specific details.

options.name: --include-project-references
options.description: Include project references as components (can only be used with project files).

options.name: --set-name
options.description: Override the autogenerated BOM metadata component name.

options.name: --set-version
options.description: Override the default BOM metadata component version (defaults to 0.0.0).

options.name: --set-type
options.description: Override the default BOM metadata component type (defaults to application). [default: Application]

options.name: --set-nuget-purl
options.description: Override the default BOM metadata component bom ref and PURL as NuGet package.

options.name: --spec-version
options.description: Which version of CycloneDX spec to use. [default: 1.7]

options.name: --exclude-filter
options.description: A comma separated list of dependencies to exclude in form 'name1@version1,name2@version2' or 'name1,name2' (to exclude all versions). Transitive dependencies will also be removed.

options.name: --output-format
options.description: Select the BOM output format: auto (default), xml, json, or unsafeJson (relaxed escaping).

options.name: --out
options.description: (Deprecated use --output instead) The directory to write the BOM

options.name: --json
options.description: (Deprecated use --output-format instead) Output in JSON format

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

options.name: --version
options.description: Versionsinformationen anzeigen

arguments.name: PATH
arguments.description: The path to a .sln, .slnf, .slnx, .csproj, .fsproj, .vbproj, .xsproj, or packages.config file or the path to a directory which will be recursively analyzed for packages.config files.
